mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOARD ORDER BY seq DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD
(title LIKE '%' || #{searchTerm} || '%' OR writer LIKE '%' || #{searchTerm} || '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD (seq, writer, title, contents, view_count, write_date) VALUES (board_seq.nextval, #{writer}, #{title}, #{contents}, 0, sysdate)
